content:
Good progress.

Do not stop at implementation.

Complete the remaining work.

Requirements:

1. Finish the Android release build successfully.
2. Produce a signed APK.
3. Install the APK on a clean Android device.
4. Verify:
   - no Maximum Update Depth error
   - Home screen opens
   - Admin metrics moved correctly
   - Reels work
   - Video upload works
   - Members pagination works
5. Deploy the verified code.
6. Return:
   - GitHub commit SHA
   - Build ID
   - APK download
   - Real-device screen recording
   - Production deployment ID

Implementation alone is not completion.
The task is complete only after a verified APK passes QA.
